scripts.install-all: npm run install-client && npm run install-server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,BACKEND -c cyan,green --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail "npm run client" "npm run server"
scripts.build: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c blue,magenta "npm run build-client" "npm run build-server"
scripts.start: cd server && docker-compose down && docker-compose up
